description: Canonical inventory of repositories confirmed as part of the Construction OS platform.

entries.role_summary: Specification and coordination layer defining apps, workflows, role models, and runtime/kernel mappings for the Construction OS platform.
Governance-controlled intelligence curation system with evidence-linked failure/success patterns, confidence tracking, and immutable history.
Worker fleet specification and doctrine repo defining extraction workers, output contracts, and routing rules for construction signal generation.
Execution platform for service-based contractor operations.
Execution platform for building-envelope delivery pipeline.
Canonical kernel defining construction truth structures, contracts, schemas, and the condition pattern library. Does not implement runtime logic.
Deterministic execution engine implementing evidence ingestion, assembly inference, drawing generation, QA checks, revision management, package building, export, and graph reference projection.
Shadow observation bus that monitors architecture drift, seam integrity, derived artifact discipline, and registry completeness. Read-only — never mutates system state.
Master registry cataloging kernels, repositories, domains, families, and system-wide architecture snapshots.

exclusions.reason: PRE-UTK independent system. Not part of Construction OS. See ValidKernel_Registry for classification.
